scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run lint:palette && npm run check:json-bom && npm run check:i18n-parity && npm run build
scripts.skills:install: npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills -y -a cursor -s vercel-react-best-practices web-design-guidelines vercel-composition-patterns --copy && npx skills add vercel-labs/next-skills -y -a cursor -s next-best-practices --copy && npx skills add vercel-labs/skills -y -a cursor -s find-skills --copy && node scripts/sync-skills.mjs
